name: Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together egg, milk, pumpkin, and oil.
2. In another bowl, mix dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
3. Add the dry mixture to the pumpkin mixture.
4. Fold in raisins.
5. Pour into muffin cups.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 18 - 20 minutes.
